communication_data:
<REASON>: The question asks why someone needs to be doing housework themselves, which implies a reason related to the consequences or feelings associated with housework. Options A (become tired), B (backache), D (fatigue) all relate to physical effects of doing housework, while C (low pay) and E (funny) do not directly relate to the necessity of doing housework oneself.
